title: AN ACT FURTHER AMENDING SECTION ELEVEN OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED THREE HUNDRED TWENTY-EIGHT, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE CHARTER OF THE CITY OF CALBAYOG.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4454 / 56 OG No. 51, 7762 (December 19, 1960)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2689, June 18, 1960 ]

AN ACT FURTHER AMENDING SECTION ELEVEN OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED THREE HUNDRED TWENTY-EIGHT, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE CHARTER OF THE CITY OF CALBAYOG.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The last paragraph of Section eleven of Republic Act Numbered Three hundred twenty-eight, as amended, is further amended to read as follows:

"The members of the Municipal Board shall each receive a salary of two thousand four hundred pesos

per annum

:

Provided, however,

That they shall not be entitled to collect any per diems and travelling allowances when per-forming their duties within the city."

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 18, 1960.
